title: Vancouver Island diver discovers ‘ancient’ rare cloud sponges in Saanich Inlet
description: A Vancouver Island diver has captured rare footage of ancient cloud sponges deep beneath the water of the Saanich Inlet, part of a fragile reef system once thought extinct. The post Vancouver Island diver discovers ‘ancient’ rare cloud sponges in Saanich Inlet appeared first on CHEK .
